hero.title:
Immigration & visa
services agency in Bangkok, Thailand
hero.description: We are an agency specialized in visa and immigration assistance and personalized service in Bangkok, Thailand.
hero.testimonialQuote: This agency helped my girlfriend get her schengen visa for our summer holiday and service was top notch.

visa.heading: Visa assistance
visa.description: Getting a visa can be a tough process and visa refusal costs not only time but also money. Our agency is specialized in visa procedures and can help you to get your visa. Whether you need a tourist, business, student, or work visa, we provide expert and comprehensive assistance. Our expert team ensures that you meet all the requirements, handles all the paperwork, prepares you for embassy interviews, and deals with the embassies for you. We streamline the visa acquisition process, making it faster and easier for you.
visa.guaranteeText: If your visa application is denied, we will issue a full refund of our service fee.

immigration.heading: Immigration assistance
immigration.description: When in a foreign country, immigration rules can be intimidating and complex, and failing to comply with those rules can have tremendous consequences. This is where an agency can be useful to help you complete your immigration procedures correctly. Our agency specializes in assisting foreigners with their immigration processes, from the essential 90-Day report in Thailand to more complex immigration procedures. Our team ensures compliance with local regulations, handles the paperwork, and manages communication with immigration authorities on your behalf.

items.title: 90-Day Report for Foreigners
items.description: We provide an extra convenient 90-Day report service for foreigners in Thailand. Our agents come pick up your documents directly at your home, do the 90 day report on your behalf and return your passport with the report receipt within 24 hours.

items.title: Driving License Renewal
items.description: Need to renew your Thai driving license? Our team handles the entire renewal process for you, from document preparation to submission at the Department of Land Transport (DLT). Save yourself the hassle and let our experienced agents take care of it.

items.title: TM.30 Update and Notification
items.description: The TM.30 is a notification of residence that must be filed for foreign nationals staying in Thailand. We handle the entire TM.30 filing and update process for you, ensuring compliance with Thai immigration regulations and helping you avoid potential fines or complications.

items.title: Document Translation and Consular Legalization for Marriage Registration
items.description: Planning to register your marriage in Thailand? We provide certified document translation and consular legalization services to ensure all your documents meet the legal requirements for marriage registration in Thailand.

items.title: Personal assistant
items.description: Do you need any assistance and to delegate some tasks on a weekly or monthly basis? We can assign one or more of our personal assistants to you. With a personal assistant you will get more time for your family or business and you will reduce your work load.

items.title: Do you need a specific service?
items.description: If you need help for any paperwork, such as getting a police certificate or any task that can be delegated, our team can help. Contact us and we will do our best to help you.

contactPage.metaDescription: Contact PT Services in Bangkok for visa assistance, immigration services, travel planning, and more. We are open Monday to Saturday, 9 AM to 6 PM.
contactPage.heading: Contact us
contactPage.subtitle: We are open from Monday to Saturday, 9 AM to 6 PM (UTC+7).

meta.title: 90-Day Report Service in Thailand – Bangkok, Pathum Thani & Samut Prakan - PT Services Agency
meta.description: Professional 90-day report service in Bangkok, Pathum Thani and Samut Prakan. Our staff picks up your passport, completes the report at immigration, and returns your documents the same day.

ninetyDayReport.title: 90-Day Report Service in Thailand
ninetyDayReport.featuresText: Our team handles everything from start to finish. A staff member picks up your passport directly at your residence, completes the 90-day report at the immigration office on your behalf, and returns your documents the same day. The process is fully legal, fast, and affordable, with transparent pricing and no hidden fees. We currently serve foreigners living in Bangkok, Pathum Thani, and Samut Prakan.
ninetyDayReport.documentsIntro: Our staff only need the following documents to complete the 90-day report on your behalf:
documents: Your original passport
A signed copy of your passport (for the power of attorney)
TM.30 form (you can send a digital file if available)
TDAC (Thai Digital Arrival Card)
Power of attorney form (our staff will bring it for you to sign during document pickup)
ninetyDayReport.priceIntro: Our service fee depends on your location. Our pricing is transparent with no hidden fees.

faq.question: How do I book your service?
faq.answer: You can book our service simply by contacting us. We will agree on a date and a time for our staff to pick up your documents at your residence and return them once the 90-day report is completed.

faq.question: Do I need to pay in advance?
faq.answer: In most cases, no upfront payment is required. You pay only when our staff returns your documents after completing the 90-day report. However, we may sometimes request a small deposit in advance to secure your appointment and prevent no-shows.

faq.question: Do I need to go to the immigration office?
faq.answer: No, there is no need for you to visit the immigration office. Our staff handles the entire process for you. We only need a few documents: your original passport, a signed passport copy, TM.30 form, and a power of attorney form (which we bring for you to sign during pickup).

faq.question: How long does the 90-day reporting process take?
faq.answer: Our staff picks up your documents in the morning, completes the 90-day report at the immigration office, and returns your passport along with the official receipt by the afternoon. The entire process is completed within the same business day.

faq.question: How much does the 90-Day report service cost?
faq.answer:
Our service fee depends on your location:

• Bangkok: 1,000 – 1,500 THB
• Pathum Thani: 1,500 – 2,000 THB
• Samut Prakan: 1,500 – 2,000 THB

The exact price depends on where our staff needs to pick up and return your documents.

faq.question: Which areas do you cover?
faq.answer: We currently provide our 90-day report service in Bangkok, Pathum Thani, and Samut Prakan.

meta.title: TDAC Form Filling Service - PT Services Agency
meta.description: Thailand Digital Arrival Card (TDAC) form filling service. We prepare your TDAC in advance and deliver it online before your trip. Only 300 THB per person.

tdac.title: Thailand Digital Arrival Card (TDAC) Form Filling Service For Entry Into Thailand
tdac.intro:
Avoid wasting time queuing at the airport! Let us prepare your Thailand Digital Arrival Card (TDAC) in advance and deliver it to you online before your trip.

Our service is designed to be:
features: Easy – Just tell us your travel date, and we'll handle the rest
Fast – Receive your completed TDAC form quickly and hassle-free
Affordable – Quality service at a friendly price
tdac.priceContent: We charge a service fee of 300 THB per person.

faq.question: How do I use your service?
faq.answer: Simply contact us, provide your travel details (flight date and basic information), and we will handle the TDAC form for you. You'll receive the completed form online before your departure.

faq.question: Do I need to pay in advance?
faq.answer: Yes, the full payment of 300 THB per person is required in advance to confirm your booking and begin processing your TDAC form.

faq.question: How long does it take to complete the TDAC?
faq.answer: Normally, we will send you the completed TDAC form within 1–3 hours after we receive all the required information from you (this may vary slightly depending on the time of day and current workload).

faq.question: How much does the TDAC form filling service cost?
faq.answer: Our service fee is 300 THB per person.

meta.title: TM30 Notification & Update Service in Bangkok - PT Services Agency
meta.description: Professional TM30 residence notification and update service in Bangkok. Online TM30 filing from 300 THB, TM30 updates from 1,000 THB. Fast, legal and reliable.

tm30.title: TM30 Update & Notification Service
tm30.intro: TM30 Residence Notification is a mandatory residence reporting requirement for all foreigners staying in Thailand under immigration law. The resident or property owner must notify the Immigration Bureau within 24 hours of moving to a new address to keep the residence information accurate and up-to-date. Our TM30 Notification & Update Service is designed to meet every foreigner's need in Thailand:
features: Fast and convenient service that professionally handles your TM30 notification and updates, minimizing hassle and saving you time
Fully compliant with Thai immigration laws, ensuring your safety and the reliability of the process
Comprehensive support for foreigners of all nationalities residing in Thailand
Complete service from document preparation to submitting your TM30 report to the Immigration Bureau
Close guidance and consultation throughout the entire TM30 notification process, answering your questions promptly
tm30.documentsOnlineHeading: Documents Required for Online TM30 Submission
tm30.documentsOnlineIntro: To ensure your TM30 residence notification through the Thai Immigration Bureau's online system is fast, accurate, and complete, foreigners residing in Thailand must prepare the following essential documents:
documentsOnline: A clear photo or scanned copy of the resident's passport information page.
A clear photo or scanned copy of the latest entry stamp into Thailand.
A clear photo or scanned copy of the visa page or e-visa file.
A copy of the house registration or condominium document showing the current residence address.
A copy of the ID card of the property owner or the person responsible for the residence.
Contact phone number of the person submitting the notification.
Power of attorney document (if authorizing someone else to act on your behalf).
tm30.documentsUpdateHeading: Documents Required for TM30 Residence Update
tm30.documentsUpdateIntro: In case of any changes to your residence information or other details, please prepare the following documents for TM30 update:
documentsUpdate: Copy of ID card or passport of householder, the owner or the possessor of a dwelling place, certified as a true copy.
A certified true copy of the house registration, lease agreement, or sales contract.
Passports of all foreigners residing at the same address.
If the TM30 update is submitted late, a fine ranging from 800 to 2,000 THB may apply. Fines can be paid directly to immigration officers at the Immigration Office.
priceItems:
Online TM30 Residence Notification – Only 300 THB
Enjoy fast, convenient, and fully legal TM30 residence notification online with our expert service at just 300 THB.

TM30 Residence Update – Comprehensive Service for 1,000 THB
We provide a full-service TM30 residence update for 1,000 THB. Please note, this fee does not include any fines for late submission, which must be paid directly to immigration officers at the Immigration Office.

faq.question: How can I use your services?
faq.answer:
Simply contact us and let us know your needs whether it's TM30 online residence notification within 24 hours or TM30 residence update. The professional team at PT Services is ready to assist you quickly and accurately.

For online TM30 residence notification within 24 hours, simply submit the required documents to us as instructed, and receive your TM30 notification receipt within 1–3 hours.

For TM30 residence updates, submit your updated documents to us. Our staff will arrange a convenient appointment to collect the documents at your address and proceed with the update.

faq.question: Do I need to pay in advance?
faq.answer:
For TM30 online residence notification within 24 hours, we require full prepayment of 300 THB per person to confirm your booking and begin processing your notification quickly and accurately.

For TM30 residence updates, we require a prepayment deposit of 500 THB per person to confirm your booking and begin preparing your documents for a complete and accurate residence update.

faq.question: How long does TM30 residence notification and update take?
faq.answer:
For TM30 online residence notification within 24 hours, once you submit all required documents, the PT Services team will complete the notification and send you the residence notification receipt within 1–3 hours for your convenience and speed.

For TM30 residence updates, processing time depends on the number of visitors at the Immigration Office, but generally takes about 1–2 hours to complete on-site.

faq.question: What are the service fees for TM30 residence notification and update?
faq.answer: Our online TM30 residence notification service within 24 hours is available for just 300 THB per person, providing fast and convenient assistance for foreigners residing in Thailand. For TM30 residence updates, we offer a comprehensive and fully compliant service at 1,000 THB per person, including professional guidance throughout the entire process.

meta.title: Thai Driving License Application & Renewal for Foreigners in Bangkok - PT Services Agency
meta.description: Thai driving license application and renewal service for foreigners in Bangkok. Complete end-to-end service from 4,000 to 6,500 THB including vehicle for driving test.

driverLicense.title: Thai Driving License Application & Renewal Services in Bangkok for Foreigners – Convenient, Fast and Fully Legal
driverLicense.intro:
If you are a foreigner living in Bangkok and need to renew a Thai driving license or apply for a Thai driving license for the first time, whether for a car or motorcycle, our service is here to make the entire process simple, convenient and stress-free.

For those applying for a Thai driving license for the first time, we take care of every step from eligibility checks and preparation of all required documents to advance appointment booking with the Department of Land Transport, as well as guidance and on-site support on the day of application. You don't need to worry about complicated procedures or communication with officials.

For Thai driving license renewals, we help reduce delays and hassle by handling document preparation, verification and appointment scheduling efficiently.

Our professional team provides a complete, end-to-end service, ensuring that every step is handled legally and correctly, so you can drive in Thailand with confidence, safety, and peace of mind.
driverLicense.docsFirstTimeHeading: Documents Required for Foreigners Applying for a Thai Driving License (First-Time Application)
docsFirstTime: Passport (Copy of the personal information page/Copy of the latest visa page/Copy of the most recent Thailand entry stamp page)
driverLicense.docsRenewalHeading: Documents Required for Foreigners to Renew a Thai Driving License
docsRenewal: Passport (Copy of the personal information page/Copy of the latest visa page/Copy of the most recent Thailand entry stamp page)
driverLicense.priceHeading: Thai Driving License Application & Renewal Service Fees for Foreigners
driverLicense.priceIntro:
Our service fees range from THB 4,000 to THB 6,500.
This price includes all processing and handling, so you don't need to worry about any hidden or additional charges. Everything is clearly covered to ensure a smooth, transparent and stress-free experience.
priceIncludes: Vehicle Provided for the Driving Test
Driving License Fee at the Department of Land Transport
driverLicense.priceNote: Note that the Residence Certificate is not included.

faq.question: How can I book your service?
faq.answer:
You can easily book our Thai driving license application or renewal service by simply contacting us and informing us of your request. After that, please send photos of your existing driving license or available documents for our team to conduct a preliminary review.

Once the information is verified, we will provide a clear summary of the service fees, explain the process step by step, and take care of you throughout the entire procedure until completion. Every step is handled legally, efficiently and professionally, ensuring a smooth experience while saving you valuable time with complete peace of mind.

faq.question: Do I need to make a payment in advance?
faq.answer: Yes. Full payment is required before the process begins so our team can immediately proceed with document preparation, training arrangements and appointment booking with the Department of Land Transport.

faq.question: How long does it take to apply for a new Thai driving license or renew an existing one?
faq.answer:
For a first-time Thai driving license application, the process generally takes around 2 working days, depending on successfully passing the required theory exams and driving tests as stipulated by the Department of Land Transport.

For Thai driving license renewal, the process can usually be completed within 1 day, provided that all required documents are complete. Our team closely manages and coordinates every step to ensure the process is fast, legally compliant and efficient, helping you save as much time as possible while avoiding unnecessary complications.

faq.question: Which areas does this service cover?
faq.answer: This service is available for foreigners residing in Bangkok and nearby areas.

marriageTranslation.title: Document Translation and Consular Legalization Service for Marriage Registration in Thailand
marriageTranslation.intro: If you are planning to marry a Thai citizen or register your marriage in Thailand, preparing the correct documents is a crucial step. Our all-in-one service covers every stage of the process:
introFeatures: Professional Document Translation (English–Thai / Thai–English / other languages) by certified translators
Consular Legalization Certified signature verification from the Department of Consular Affairs, Ministry of Foreign Affairs
Expert Guidance & Document Review Ensuring your paperwork meets all requirements for a smooth marriage registration process in Thailand
suitableItems: Foreigners who wish to register their marriage with a Thai citizen
Couples who need to submit foreign-issued documents for use in Thailand
Those who require accurate translation and legalization of documents in compliance with Thai government procedures
processItems: Verify the original documents and ensure their accuracy
Translate by a professional translator with a certified signature on the translation
Submit the documents for consular legalization at the Department of Consular Affairs
Return the legalized documents to the client, ready for use
marriageTranslation.priceHeading: Document Translation and Consular Legalization Service Fee
marriageTranslation.priceContent: A fixed service fee of 5,500 THB covers professional document translation and consular legalization by the Ministry of Foreign Affairs for marriage registration in Thailand. This all-inclusive price includes every step from certified professional translation and thorough document verification to completing the legalization process in full compliance with official Thai government standards.
marriageTranslation.tipsHeading: Tips for Using Our Document Translation & Consular Legalization Service for a Smooth and Fast Process
marriageTranslation.tipsContent: For a smooth and efficient experience with our document translation and consular legalization service for marriage registration in Thailand, we recommend booking your appointment at least 2–3 weeks in advance. This allows our team to secure a timeslot with the Department of Consular Affairs, Ministry of Foreign Affairs, within the required timeframe. Once all documents are complete and ready for processing, the legalization procedure takes approximately 7–10 business days. You can be confident that your documents will be properly legalized in full compliance with official Thai government procedures ready for immediate use in your marriage registration.
marriageTranslation.ctaHeading: Let Us Handle Every Step for You
marriageTranslation.ctaContent: Simply contact us and let us know you need our document translation and consular legalization service for marriage registration we'll take care of everything from start to finish with a seamless, all-in-one process:
ctaSteps: Contact us and share your requirements
Make the payment and schedule a document handover with our staff
Submit your documents for review and processing
Receive your translated and fully legalized documents within 7–10 business days
marriageTranslation.ctaFooter: With our service, you can be confident that your paperwork will be accurate, fully compliant with official Thai government standards, and ready to use immediately without the hassle of handling the process yourself.

meta.title: Schengen Visa in Thailand
meta.description: Professional Schengen visa assistance in Thailand. Document preparation, embassy submission and interview coaching. THB 8,500 with 100% refund guarantee.

schengen.title: Schengen Visa
schengen.intro: If you wish to travel to Europe, you will need a Schengen visa. The Schengen visa allows you to travel for 90 days maximum in any European country who is part of the Schengen area.
schengen.documentsHeading: Documents Required For A Schengen Visa
documents: Passport (must be valid for at least 3 months after the end of the planned stay)
Passport sized photography not older than 6 months (3.5cm x 4.5cm)
Visa application form
Confirmed reservation of flight tickets
Detailed itinerary (if the applicant plans to visit several countries)
Proof of accommodation (for example hotel reservations for the entire duration of stay in the Schengen countries)
If employed: employment proof (work certificate, monthly salary, position in the company etc)
Proof of sufficient funds (original bank statements with stamps)
Travel and health insurance (minimum coverage of Euro 30,000)
A sponsoring letter (if applicable)
schengen.documentsExtra:
If the trip is sponsored, the applicant will have to provide a sponsoring letter. The sponsor will also have to provide documents such as a copy of the passport, bank statements for the last three months including the bank account movements and more.

If the applicant is a foreigner living in Thailand, the applicant will have to provide the original and copy of work permit (if applicable) and the re-entry stamp from Thai immigration, valid after coming back from the Schengen area.
schengen.processingTimeContent: The usual processing time is between 4 days and 15 days for tourism purposes (visiting family, tourist visits etc). However, it can happen that the processing time can take up to 45 days, for example during high season.
schengen.feesContent:
The Schengen visa is free for children under 6 years old, costs €45 (around THB 1800) for children up to 11 years old and costs €90 (around THB 3,600) for adults. The fee is fixed in Euro but is payable in Thai baht only. Therefore the application fee may vary depending on the current exchange rate between the two currencies.

The visa fee shall be waived if the applicant belongs to a specific category. For example, the spouse of a German citizen will have their visa fee waived.
schengen.interviewContent: In case the visa agency requires further details or clarification, you may need to participate in a phone interview. A badly handled interview can potentially lead to the failure of your visa application. PT Services can help you prepare for you interview to help you succeed and secure your visa.
schengen.consultationHeading: Get A Free Consultation With Our Experts
schengen.consultationContent: At PT Services, we understand that applying for a Schengen visa can be difficult and if the application is unsuccessful it can result in a loss of both time and money. This is why we offer a free consultation with our experts in order to correctly understand your needs and give you free advices on your application.
servicesItems: Thorough understanding of your visa requirements to ensure the visa is suitable for you
Comprehensive review of your documents
Preparation and submission of your visa application to relevant government agencies
Guidance and preparation for the visa interview
schengen.pricing:
Our pricing is transparent and we charge a fixed fee of THB 8,500.
Our service fee does not include the translations of your documents.
schengen.guaranteeText: If your visa application is denied, we will issue a full refund of our service fee.

meta.title: UK VISA in Thailand - PT Services Agency
meta.description: Professional UK visa assistance in Thailand. Document preparation, embassy submission and interview coaching. THB 8,500 fixed service fee.

uk.title: United Kingdom Visa
uk.intro: If you're planning to visit the United Kingdom (UK), you will need to apply for a UK Visa as Thai nationals are required to have a visa to enter the UK. The type of visa you need depends on the purpose of your trip and each visa category permits you to remain in the UK for a set duration. For example, a tourist visa typically allows you to stay for up to six months. Our agency can help you get your UK visa without hassle.
uk.documentsIntro: The list of documents required by UK Visas and Immigration is not comprehensive, and therefore the required documents may differ from case to case. Some of the documents commonly asked are:
documents: Visa application form
Current and previous passports
Copy of Thai ID card
Name change certificates (if applicable)
Introduction letter
Proof of accommodation (for example hotel reservation)
Documents proving financial circumstances (bank statements covering the past 6 months etc)
Document stating purpose of the trip
Documents proving ties and responsibilities in Thailand
If employed, proof of employment, pay slips, confirmation letter etc. If business owner, registration documents, 6-12 bank statements etc.
uk.documentsExtra: The sponsor will also need to provide documentation, such as a copy of their passport, financial statements, proof of accommodation, and any additional evidence showing they can cover the applicant's stay. Contact us for more details about the documents needed.
uk.feesContent: The visa fee varies depending on the type of visa you apply for and its validity period. For example, a single or multiple-entry tourist visa that allows a stay of up to 6 months costs £127 (approximately 6,000 THB, subject to exchange rate fluctuations). You can check the most up-to-date fees on the official UK government website. Feel free to contact us for more information.
uk.consultationHeading: Get A Free Consultation With Our Experts
uk.consultationContent: At PT Services, we know that the UK visa application process can be complex, and an unsuccessful result may cost you both time and money. That's why we offer a free consultation with our experts to understand your specific needs and provide personalized advice on your application. And if you want to, our agency can then handle the entire process on your behalf to help you get your UK visa.
uk.servicesHeading: Let Our Agency Help You Get Your UK Visa
servicesItems: Thorough understanding of your situation and the visa requirements to ensure which visa is suitable for you
Comprehensive review and rigorous preparation of your documents
Preparation and submission of your visa application to relevant government agencies
uk.pricing:
Our pricing is transparent. We charge a fixed fee of THB 8,500 for our service.
Embassy fee: £127 (approximately THB 6,000), paid separately.

meta.title: Get your US VISA in Thailand - PT Services Agency
meta.description: Professional US visa assistance in Thailand. DS-160 completion, document preparation, interview coaching. THB 10,860 with unlimited retry guarantee.

usa.title: U.S. B1/B2 Visa (Tourist and Business Visa)
usa.intro: If you are planning to travel to the United States (USA), you will need to apply for a U.S. visa, as Thai citizens are required to obtain a visa before entering the country. The type of visa you need will depend on the purpose of your visit. For example, the B1/B2 Tourist and Business Visa allows you to stay in the U.S. for a period determined by the immigration officer (typically up to 6 months). Our team is here to assist you throughout the entire U.S. visa application process—quickly, professionally, and with ease.
usa.documentsHeading: Required Documents for U.S. Tourist/Business Visa (B1/B2)
documents1: Passport – Must be valid for at least 6 months beyond the date of entry into the United States. Previous Passports (if available) – Especially those containing past visas or travel history.
DS-160 Form – Complete the form online and print the confirmation page with the barcode.
Photo (2x2 inches / 5x5 cm) – White background, no eyeglasses, taken within the last 6 months.
Appointment Confirmation – Printed from the system after scheduling your interview appointment online.
Visa Fee Receipt – Proof of payment for the visa application fee (approximately USD 185; subject to change based on exchange rates).
usa.documentsSubheading2: Additional Supporting Documents (to demonstrate ties to Thailand)
documents2: Employment Certificate – Should state your job title, salary, start date, and confirm that you are authorized to take leave for travel.
Pay Slips (last 3 months) or Other Proof of Income – To demonstrate your financial stability.
Bank Statement – At least 3–6 months of recent statements to show sufficient financial means.
Copy of House Registration and National ID Card – To confirm your identity and permanent residence in Thailand.
Flight and Hotel Booking (Optional) – Not required to purchase in advance, but can be used to demonstrate your travel plans.
Invitation Letter (if applicable) – If you are visiting relatives or friends in the U.S., include an invitation letter along with a copy of the inviter's ID or visa.
Other Supporting Documents – Such as a marriage certificate, children's birth certificates, proof of business ownership, etc.
usa.feesContent:
The visa fee for a U.S. B1/B2 visa depends on the visa type and the length of stay granted. Generally, this visa allows travel to the United States for tourism, visiting relatives, or short-term business purposes, with a maximum stay of up to 6 months per entry (subject to the discretion of the immigration officer). For Thai passport holders, the application fee for a B1/B2 visa is USD 185 (approximately THB 6,660, subject to exchange rate fluctuations).

You can check the latest visa fee on the official website of the U.S. Embassy or the USTravelDocs Thailand website.
usa.consultationContent: At PT Services, we understand that applying for a U.S. visa can be complicated and overwhelming. From preparing the required documents, completing the DS-160 form, and scheduling the interview, to the uncertainty of visa approval — it can be a time-consuming and costly process if not done correctly. That's why we offer professional consultation services to help assess the purpose of your trip and provide tailored advice to increase your chances of visa approval. If needed, our staff can assist you with every step: preparing the necessary documents, filling out the forms, booking the interview appointment, and even providing interview training — ensuring that your U.S. visa application is smooth, confident, and worry free.
usa.servicesHeading: Let Our Team Help You Apply for a U.S. Visa
servicesItems: Initial consultation
Review and preparation of all required documents
Accurate and complete DS-160 form completion
Embassy interview appointment scheduling
Interview coaching and preparation
usa.pricing:
Service Fee: THB 10,860 (fixed and all-inclusive for processing).
U.S. Embassy Fee: USD 185 (approximately THB 6,660), to be paid separately.
usa.specialGuaranteeText: If your visa application is rejected after the interview, you are welcome to return and use our service again unlimited times at no additional service charge. You will only be responsible for the U.S. Embassy visa fee for any future application rounds.

meta.title: France Visa in Thailand - PT Services Agency
meta.description: Professional France visa assistance in Thailand. Document preparation, embassy submission and interview coaching. THB 8,500 with 100% refund guarantee.

france.title: France Visa
france.intro: If you are planning to visit France, you will need to obtain a visa prior to entry. The specific type of visa you will need depends on the purpose of your visit, with each category granting permission to stay in France for a defined period. For instance, a tourist visa generally allows a stay of up to 90 days in any 180-day period. Our agency offers comprehensive assistance to help you obtain your visa smoothly and without hassle.
france.documentsHeading: Documents Required To Get A Visa For France
documents: Passport (must be valid for at least 3 months after the end of the planned stay)
2 x Passport sized photography not older than 6 months, ISO/IEC format (3.5 cm x 4.5cm)
Visa application form
If you're not a Thai national, proof that you are legally resident in that country
Reservation of return ticket or itinerary

If you are employee: proof of registration of the company and a certificate of employment, indicating the number of days of leave granted, the position held in the company and the monthly salary. If you are self-employed: proof that she/he is the owner of the company. If you are retired, proof of pension.

Bank statements for the past three months from your personal or company account, or the last three payslips, or a pension certificate showing the monthly pension amount (with mandatory translation into French).

Proof of accommodation: either a 'Attestation d'accueil' (a document stating that you'll stay at a private place, if staying with a private individual), a hotel reservation, a rental agreement, or a property ownership certificate.
Travel health insurance certificate
france.documentsExtra: If the applicant have a sponsor, the sponsor will also need to provide documentation, such as a copy of their passport, financial statements, proof of accommodation, and any additional evidence showing they can cover the applicant's stay. Contact us for more details about the documents needed.
france.feesContent: The visa for France is free for children under 6 years old, costs €45 (around THB 1800) for children up to 11 years old and costs €90 (around THB 3,400 to THB 3,600) for adults. The fee is fixed in Euro but is payable in Thai baht only. Therefore the application fee may vary depending on the current exchange rate between the two currencies. Certain individual cases may give rise to different prices, in accordance with applicable regulations.
france.consultationHeading: Get A Free Consultation With Our Experts
france.consultationContent: At PT Services, we understand that applying for a French visa can be difficult and if the application is unsuccessful it can result in a loss of both time and money. This is why we offer a free consultation with our experts in order to correctly understand your needs and give you free advices on your application.

servicesItems: Thorough understanding of your visa requirements to ensure the visa is suitable for you
Comprehensive review of your documents
Preparation and submission of your visa application to relevant government agencies
Guidance and preparation for the visa interview
france.pricing:
Our pricing is transparent and we charge a fixed fee of THB 8,500.
Our service does not include the translations of your documents.
france.guaranteeText: If your visa application is denied, we will issue a full refund of our service fee.

meta.title: Germany VISA in Thailand - PT Services Agency
meta.description: Professional Germany visa assistance in Thailand. Document preparation, embassy submission and interview coaching. THB 8,500 with 100% refund guarantee.

germany.title: Germany Visa
germany.intro: If you plan to travel to Germany, you will need a Schengen visa, as Germany is part of the Schengen area. The specific type of visa required depends on the purpose of your visit. For instance, a Schengen tourist visa permits stays of up to 90 days within a 180-day period in Germany or any other Schengen member country.
germany.documentsHeading: Documents Required For A German Visa
documents: Passport (must be valid for at least 3 months after the end of the planned stay)
Passport sized photography not older than 6 months (3.5cm x 4.5cm)
Visa application form completed
Confirmed reservation of flight tickets
Detailed itinerary (if the applicant plans to visit several countries)
Proof of accommodation (for example hotel reservations for the entire duration of stay in the Schengen countries)
If employed: employment proof (work certificate, monthly salary, position in the company etc)
Proof of sufficient funds (original bank statements with stamps)
Travel and health insurance (minimum coverage of Euro 30,000)
A sponsoring letter (if applicable)
germany.documentsExtra:
If the trip is sponsored, the applicant must submit a sponsorship letter. The sponsor is also required to provide supporting documents, including a copy of their passport and bank statements from the past three months, showing account activity.

For foreign applicants residing in Thailand, it is necessary to provide both the original and a copy of their work permit (if applicable), as well as a valid re-entry permit from Thai immigration, covering the return from the Schengen area.
germany.processingTimeContent: The usual processing time is between 4 days and 15 days for tourism purposes (visiting family, tourist visits etc). However, it can happen that the processing time can take up to 45 days, for example during high season.
germany.feesContent:
The German visa is free for children under 6 years old, costs €45 (around THB 1800) for children up to 11 years old and costs €90 (around THB 3,400 to THB 3,600) for adults. The fee is fixed in Euro but is payable in Thai baht only. Therefore the application fee may vary depending on the current exchange rate between the two currencies.

The visa fee shall be waived if the applicant belongs to a specific category. For example, the spouse of a German citizen will have their visa fee waived.
germany.interviewContent: In case the visa agency requires further details or clarification, you may need to participate in a phone interview. A badly handled interview can potentially lead to the failure of your visa application. PT Services can help you prepare for you interview to help you succeed and secure your visa.

germany.consultationContent: At PT Services, we understand that applying for a German visa can be difficult and if the application is unsuccessful it can result in a loss of both time and money. This is why we offer a free consultation with our experts in order to correctly understand your needs and give you free advices on your application.
servicesItems: Thorough understanding of your visa requirements to ensure the visa is suitable for you
Comprehensive review of your documents

Guidance and preparation for the visa interview

Our service fee does not include the translations of your documents.

spain.title: Spain Tourist Visa
spain.intro: If you are planning to visit Spain and you're not a national citizen from a European country, you will need to obtain a visa prior to entry. The specific type of visa you will need depends on the purpose of your visit, with each category granting permission to stay in Spain for a defined period. For instance, a tourist visa generally allows a stay of up to 90 days in any 180-day period. Our agency offers comprehensive assistance to help you obtain your visa smoothly and without hassle.
spain.documentsHeading: Documents Required To Get A Tourist Visa For Spain
documents: A Spanish Schengen visa application form (completed)

Original Passport – issued within the last 10 years, valid for at least 3 months after the date of intended exit from the Schengen area, with at least 2 blank pages. Include a copy of the data page and copies of any Schengen, US, UK or Canada visas from the past 3 years.
Official passport photo (4.5cm x 3.5cm, white background, taken within the last 6 months)
Signed letter stating purpose of travel, trip dates, accommodation details, and entries/exits from each Schengen country
Means of transport: round-trip airline reservation with PNR, proof of internal transport. Do not use fake or cancelled bookings. You do not need to purchase tickets before the visa is granted.
Accommodation: hotel booking, tour invoice, invitation letter from Spanish National Police station for private accommodation, or proof of property ownership. Fake bookings may result in refusal.
Travel insurance – EU-compliant, minimum €30,000 coverage, valid for all Schengen countries
Employment letter (with salary, employment length). Self-employed: business registration. Retired: pension proof. Students: enrollment letter.
Financial means: original bank statements (3 months), minimum €118/day/person, minimum balance €1,065. Family sponsor with relationship proof. Employer sponsor.
For Thai nationals under 20: parental consent, birth certificate (legalized/translated), parent passport copies, application form signed by both parents, visa fee (free under 6, 50% off ages 6-12)
spain.documentsExtra: Additional documents may be requested depending on the reason of the trip. Contact us for more details.
spain.processingTimeContent: The usual processing time is between 4 days and 15 days for tourism purposes (visiting family, tourist visits etc). However, it can happen that the processing time can take up to 45 days, for example during high season.
spain.feesContent:
The Schengen visa is free for children under 6 years old, costs €45 (around THB 1800) for children up to 11 years old and costs €90 (around THB 3,600) for adults. meta.title: DTV Visa Thailand - PT Services Agency
meta.description: Professional DTV (Destination Thailand Visa) assistance. Document preparation, application submission. THB 7,500 with 100% refund guarantee.

dtv.title: DTV Visa (Destination Thailand Visa)
dtv.intro:
The Destination Thailand Visa (DTV) was introduced in 2024 by the Thai government to attract long-term visitors engaged in remote work, wellness, and cultural activities. It aims to support Thailand's soft power industries while boosting tourism and the digital economy.

This new visa aims to attract high-quality tourists, remote workers (Digital Nomads), and individuals interested in participating in cultural activities in Thailand such as Muay Thai, traditional Thai massage, Thai cooking, and other activities related to Thai soft power.

Applicants must be at least 20 years old and provide proof of a bank deposit of no less than 500,000 THB maintained over the past 3 to 6 months prior to the visa application. The visa is valid for 5 years and allows multiple entries. Each stay in Thailand can last up to 180 days and can be extended once for another 180 days per entry.

Spouses and children under 20 years old of the main visa holder are eligible to apply as dependents. However, the application must be submitted from outside Thailand via the official e-Visa system. Visa holders are not permitted to work for or receive income from Thai companies. Long-term residents may be subject to Thai tax regulations if their income meets the criteria for taxation in Thailand. This visa is ideal for individuals who wish to live in Thailand long term while working remotely for overseas companies or clients, without the need for a Thai work permit.
dtv.documentsHeading: Who Is Eligible to Apply for the DTV Visa?
dtv.documentsIntro: The Destination Thailand Visa (DTV) is designed for foreigners who wish to stay in Thailand for up to one year and engage in specific permitted activities under this visa type. If your purpose of stay matches any of the conditions listed below, you may be eligible to apply for the DTV Visa:
documents1: Passport Biodata Page or Travel Document (must be valid within 6 months from travel date)
Official photo of the applicant, taken within the past six months
Document indicating current location (driving license, bank statement, proof of stay or passport stamp)
Employment contract or employment certificate in their country or professional portfolio showcasing digital nomad, remote worker, foreign talent or freelancer status

A copy of a recent saving or checking bank statement with an ending balance of no less than THB 500,000 that shows the applicant's name and date. In case of submitting a family bank statement, proof of relationship (i.e. birth certificate, marriage certificate) must be provided
dtv.documentsSubheading2: 2. Cultural Activities and Thai Soft Power
documents2: Passport Biodata Page or Travel Document (must be valid within 6 months from travel date)
Photograph of the applicant, taken within the past six months
Document indicating current location (driving license, bank statement, or proof of stay)
Letter of acceptance from institute or company organizing activities, letter of appointment from hospital/medical center

A copy of a recent saving or checking bank statement with an ending balance of no less than 500,000 THB that shows the applicant's name and date. In case of submitting a family bank statement, proof of relationship (i.e. birth certificate, marriage certificate) must be provided
dtv.documentsSubheading3: 3. Spouse or Children of a DTV Visa Holder
documents3: Passport Biodata Page or Travel Document (must be valid within 6 months from travel date)
Photograph of the applicant, taken within the past six months
Document indicating current location (driving license, bank statement, or proof of stay)
Personal details of a DTV visa holder: passport biodata page and the DTV visa approval of the DTV visa holder

A copy of a recent saving or checking bank statement with an ending balance of no less than 500,000 THB that shows the applicant's name and date. In case of submitting a family bank statement, proof of relationship (i.e. birth certificate, marriage certificate, or adoption certificate) must be provided
dtv.feesContent: The standard fee for the Destination Thailand Visa (DTV) is 10,000 THB for a 5-year multiple-entry visa issued by the Thai government. However, the actual fee may vary depending on the country of application due to exchange rates, embassy service fees, and additional charges.
dtv.consultationHeading: Get a Free Consultation With Our Experts
dtv.consultationContent: At PT Services, we understand that applying for the Destination Thailand Visa (DTV) can be complex, especially when it comes to preparing documents and meeting various requirements. An unsuccessful application may result in wasted time and unnecessary expenses. For this reason, we offer a free consultation with our experts to help you understand the specific conditions of the DTV visa and provide tailored advice based on your situation. If you need assistance, our team is ready to handle every step on your behalf — from document preparation to visa submission — ensuring a smooth and confident DTV visa application process.
dtv.servicesHeading: Let Our Staff Assist You With Your DTV Visa Application
servicesItems: A thorough assessment of your situation to ensure the DTV visa is suitable and meets all requirements
Careful review and preparation of all documents, with guidance throughout the process
Preparation and submission of your DTV visa application to the relevant authorities, including follow-up on the application status
dtv.pricing:
Our service fee is a fixed price of THB 7,500 (VAT included).
This does not include embassy fees or official visa charges, which vary depending on the country of application.

TDAC Submission, TM30 Notification, and 90-Day Reporting Services for Foreigners in Thailand
After receiving approval for the DTV Visa, foreigners entering Thailand are required to submit the TDAC (Thailand Digital Arrival Card) at least 3 days prior to their arrival date.

Upon arrival in Thailand, foreigners must notify their place of residence by submitting the TM30 form within 24 hours. Additionally, foreigners are required to complete the 90-Day Reporting to the Immigration Bureau every 90 days.

PT Services offers comprehensive assistance including:
- TDAC submission before entering Thailand: 300 THB per person
- TM30 residence notification within 24 hours: 300 THB per person (1,000 THB for address updates)
- 90-Day Reporting service: 1,000 – 1,500 THB depending on the travel distance
dtv.guaranteeText: If your visa application is denied, we will issue a full refund of our service fee.
